finding_results.notes: Tommy now sees Martin take the pill while coming out of the upstairs shared bathroom and heading back down to the canonical first-floor green room. After taking the remaining pills from the master bedroom, he retreats to the green room off the hall, watches Doug come down from the shared upstairs bathroom, and re-enters the morning scene from that first-floor room.

The chapter keeps one clear failed locker-room coaching beat in the first morning exchange. The later pre-flush turn no longer repeats Tommy giving orders and being mocked; it now pivots on Joel's warning that county scrutiny is imminent, which creates a concrete time cost and sends Tommy to the bathroom.

Two targeted edits to the early-morning kitchen exchange (lines 117 and 121). Cliff's 'That is a hell of a phrase' corrected to 'That's a hell of a thing to say' — contraction restored, 'phrase' replaced with the more colloquial 'thing,' and 'before anybody's even called' adds natural contracted auxiliary. Joel's composed punchline ('Unfortunately, I do' + balanced 'locker room / team meeting' metaphor) replaced with a self-interrupting redirect: 'Yeah, we do. And — it's not the time, Tommy. You're coaching.' The dash marks genuine mid-thought abandonment; 'it's not the time' centers grief over diagnosis; 'You're coaching' is a flat two-word observation using shorthand the group would have for Tommy's behavior, not a balanced rhetorical construction. Nate's grief-static line at 123 left untouched — already alive. The later rebuke cluster (snapshot lines 149-163: 'coaching witnesses' / 'football speeches and legal seminars' / 'pregame') was already replaced by a prior revision with Joel's practical bathroom-timing warning and Tommy's internal realization, eliminating the three-consecutive-polished-restatement problem at that location.

Compressed the hallway-pill beat to one unmistakable blue-pill image plus Tommy on all fours, then moved directly into recovery and the bathroom action without a second sentence paraphrasing the humiliation.

pass_summaries.summary: Revised Chapter 3 to restore the continuity-safe first-floor green room geography for Tommy and to replace the second post-dawn coaching loop with a new imminent-scrutiny beat that drives the flush.

Single finding addressed with two line-level dialogue edits. Cliff's stiff uncontracted 'That is' returned to his moderate-contraction transactional register. Joel's mic-ready two-part punchline broken into a self-interrupting redirect that names the behavior flatly rather than diagnosing it with balanced metaphor. The post-deputy rebuke cluster (snapshot 149-163) had already been replaced by a prior pass, so no further changes were needed there. The revised sequence at lines 117-123 now delivers three distinct reactions — Cliff's colloquial observation, Joel's friction-laden redirect, Nate's grief-exhaustion — without queuing up polished variations on the same joke.
Tightened the hallway-pill set piece so the comedy lands through action and one concrete image, then advances immediately into the flush and Mallick's arrival.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=4, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
